# S360 Dashboard Reports

This directory stores generated S360 status reports.

## Naming Convention

- **Overview**: `overview_YYYYMMDD.md` — full dashboard status snapshot
- **Detail**: `detail_{KpiId}_YYYYMMDD.md` — per-KPI resource extraction report

## Generated by

- [s360-overview skill](../../.github/skills/s360-overview-1.0.0/SKILL.md)
- [s360-item-detail skill](../../.github/skills/s360-item-detail-1.0.0/SKILL.md)
